skill.name: pexoai-agent
skill.description: Use this skill when the user wants to produce a short video (5–120 seconds). Supports any video type: product ads, TikTok/Instagram/YouTube content, brand videos, explainers, social clips. USE FOR: video production, AI video, make a video, product video, brand video, promotional clip, explainer video, short video.
skill.summary: AI video creation agent that produces professional short videos from text prompts or uploaded assets.
skill.author: pexoai

security_audit.summary: The pexoai-agent skill is a legitimate video production integration tool. It executes shell scripts to interact with the Pexo AI video generation API. The static analyzer flagged numerous patterns (external commands, network access, environment variables) but these are all expected behavior for an API integration skill. The 'CRITICAL' heuristic warnings (Windows SAM database, dangerous combination) are false positives. No malicious intent was confirmed after evaluating the codebase semantics.

medium_findings.title: Shell Script Execution for API Calls
medium_findings.description: Scripts use shell command substitution to call curl and process API responses. This is expected behavior for a CLI-based API integration skill. Arguments are hardcoded strings from the skill instructions, not user input.
medium_findings.confidence_reasoning: Pattern found but is standard API integration behavior. Shell scripts execute curl commands with hardcoded API endpoints and parameters derived from skill instructions, not arbitrary user input.

low_findings.title: Environment Variable Access for API Key
low_findings.description: Scripts read PEXO_API_KEY from environment or config file. This is the expected authentication mechanism for an API integration skill.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: Standard API key access pattern - legitimate authentication for the Pexo service.

low_findings.title: Hardcoded Network Endpoints
low_findings.description: Scripts contain hardcoded URLs to pexo.ai. These are the legitimate service endpoints for the video generation API.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: Hardcoded legitimate service URLs, not suspicious external endpoints.

content.value_statement: Users need professional video content but lack video production skills or tools. Pexo Agent transforms text prompts and images into polished 5-120 second videos through an AI-powered video generation platform.
actual_capabilities: Generate professional short videos (5-120 seconds) from text prompts
Create videos in multiple aspect ratios (16:9, 9:16, 1:1) for different platforms
Accept uploaded images, videos, or audio as video references or source material
Present multiple preview options for user selection before final rendering
Support revision workflow to refine existing videos based on feedback
Handle multi-turn conversations with the AI video agent for complex requests
limitations: Video generation takes 15-20 minutes for short videos, longer for complex content
Cannot crawl or process web URLs - requires local file upload only
Requires Pexo API key and credits for video generation
Videos are limited to 120 seconds maximum duration

use_cases.title: Marketing Teams Create Product Videos
use_cases.description: Marketing managers upload product photos and describe the video concept. Pexo generates professional product advertisements optimized for social media platforms.

use_cases.title: Content Creators Produce Social Clips
use_cases.description: YouTubers and TikTok creators describe the video they need. The skill handles the technical workflow while Pexo handles creative production.

use_cases.title: Developers Integrate Video in Workflows
use_cases.description: Software developers automate video generation as part of content pipelines using Claude Code or Codex with this skill.

prompt_templates.title: Simple Video Request
prompt_templates.prompt: I want a video about [topic description]
prompt_templates.scenario: Basic request where user provides minimal context

prompt_templates.title: Product Video with Image
prompt_templates.prompt: [User uploads image] I want a product video for this item with [specific style or mood]
prompt_templates.scenario: User provides reference image and style guidance

prompt_templates.title: Social Media Clip
prompt_templates.prompt: Make a [platform: TikTok/Instagram/YouTube] video about [topic]. Style: [mood or theme]
prompt_templates.scenario: Platform-specific video request with style direction

prompt_templates.title: Video Revision
prompt_templates.prompt: I want to revise the video. Here is my feedback: [specific changes or adjustments]
prompt_templates.scenario: Iterative refinement of an existing video

output_examples.input: I want a product video for my new headphones
output_examples.output:
Your request has been submitted to Pexo. Estimated time: 15-20 minutes. Project link: https://pexo.ai/project/proj_xxx

When the video is ready, you will receive the download URL and preview options.

output_examples.input: Make it more energetic with faster transitions
output_examples.output: I have sent your feedback to Pexo. The revision will be ready in approximately 10-15 minutes.

best_practices: Copy the user's exact words when describing the video - do not add details they did not mention
Upload reference images when available - this improves video quality significantly
Wait for Pexo to ask clarifying questions rather than guessing at production parameters
anti_patterns: Do not add duration, aspect ratio, or style descriptions that the user did not specify
Do not call pexo-chat.sh while the project is in WAIT status - this creates duplicate videos
Do not truncate download URLs - send the complete URL including all query parameters

faq.question: What file formats can I upload?
faq.answer: Images: jpg, png, webp, bmp, tiff, heic. Videos: mp4, mov, avi. Audio: mp3, wav, aac, m4a, ogg, flac.

faq.question: How long does video generation take?
faq.answer: Short videos (5-15 seconds) take 15-20 minutes. Complex or longer videos may take longer.

faq.question: What if I run out of credits?
faq.answer: When a command fails with a credit error, the script will show your balance and a link to purchase more credits.

faq.question: Can I use web URLs as image sources?
faq.answer: No. Pexo cannot crawl web URLs. You must download files locally first, then upload them.

faq.question: How do I revise a video?
faq.answer: Use the same project_id and send your feedback using the revision workflow. Pexo will generate updated versions.
